summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite, alongside embedded firmware for input devices, Windows driver development, and AI/ML research for trading and poker. Also maintained several automation and utility projects across C++, Python, Kotlin, and C#.

items.title: Windows input filter driver development
items.description: Built and tested a kernel-level input filtering and injection driver for Windows.

items.title: Android TTS engine implementation
items.description: Developed an Android text-to-speech engine using Silero models and custom phonetizers.

items.title: E-ink firmware expansion
items.description: Extended custom firmware for an e-ink device with a knowledge base app and mesh chat fixes.

items.title: Crypto trading platform rewrite
items.description: Executed a full .NET rewrite of a SaaS algorithmic trading platform, building out infrastructure, trading domain, and deployment pipelines.

items.title: ESP32-S3 firmware iteration
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for a feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, including CI/CD and store publishing.

items.title: Computer vision aim assist tool
items.description: Iterated on a personal computer vision project for mouse event emulation and screen overlay.

items.title: E-ink reader custom firmware
items.description: Enhanced custom firmware for an e-ink device with a map application and knowledge base.

items.title: FlClash proxy client maintenance
items.description: Updated a proxy client with new transport support and rebased dependencies.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted deep learning experiments with mixture-of-experts architectures for cryptocurrency price prediction.

items.title: Android LLM assistant development
items.description: Built an on-device LLM chat assistant with tool-use and sub-agent delegation capabilities.

items.title: E-ink Android launcher
items.description: Created a minimalist Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink readers.

items.title: Code intelligence engine development
items.description: Built a graph-powered code intelligence engine with multi-language support and LSP integration.

items.title: Neovim configuration maintenance
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE setup with LSP and treesitter configurations.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool creation
items.description: Built a minimalistic, browser-based labeling tool for YOLO object detection projects.

items.title: Poker computer vision research
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games and reconstructing hand histories.

items.title: n8n automation node maintenance
items.description: Updated an n8n community node for integrating with an AI coding agent.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Built and maintained a multi-bot Telegram interface for trading automation.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous algorithmic trading strategies.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built a multi-session autonomous coding assistant with worktree management.

items.title: Flutter trading monitor app
items.description: Created a mobile trading dashboard with performance charts and bot management.

items.title: Telegram content aggregation bot
items.description: Maintained a Telegram bot for content aggregation, forwarding, and summarization.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy optimization
items.description: Conducted hyperparameter optimization and backtesting for algorithmic trading strategies.

items.title: Crypto trading signal bot
items.description: Developed a Telegram bot for generating and posting cryptocurrency trading signals.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot maintenance
items.description: Maintained a .NET Telegram bot for interacting with ChatGPT.
